choices.name: TaxA
choices.choiceText: A - First job this tax year (since 6th April)

fields.name: Text234_0_0
fields.fieldText: Reference Details

fields.name: Text324_0
fields.fieldText: As a minimum, we require 2 references and these must cover the past 3 years of Employment/Education.

fields.name: Reference_BPSS_1
fields.fieldText: Great! Thank you for providing your first referee details, please click next to submit a second reference.

fields.name: Confirmation
fields.fieldText: Thanks – that’s reference No{!Reference_Count_Var}. completed!

fields.name: Addmore
fields.fieldText: Have the references you’ve provided sufficiently covered the past 3 years of employment/education?

fields.name: Error_Text
fields.fieldText:
Alert!

Failed to save reference, please ensure a valid email is populated

fields.name: Final_Stage_Text_0
fields.fieldText: Reference Details

fields.name: Reference_Type_buttons
fields.fieldText: What type of Reference are you providing?

fields.name: Referee_Details_Text
fields.fieldText: Referee Details

fields.name: Referee_Name
fields.fieldText: Name

fields.name: Referee_Job_Title
fields.fieldText: Job Title

fields.name: Referee_Phone
fields.fieldText: Phone

validationRule.errorMessage: This field must be under 40 characters

fields.name: Referee_Company_Name
fields.fieldText: Company Name

fields.name: Referee_Referee_Address
fields.fieldText: Address

fields.name: Referee_Relationship
fields.fieldText: Relationship

fields.name: Referee_Occupation
fields.fieldText: Occupation

fields.name: Referee_Years_Known
fields.fieldText: Years Known (this should be 3 years or more)

fields.name: Family_Member
fields.fieldText: Please confirm the referee is not a member of your family

fields.name: Employment_detail_Text
fields.fieldText: Your Employment Detail

fields.name: Position_Held
fields.fieldText: Position Held

validationRule.errorMessage: This field must be under 50 characters

fields.name: Start_Date_of_Your_Employment
fields.fieldText: Start Date of Your Employment

fields.name: End_Date_of_Your_Employment
fields.fieldText: End Date of Your Employment

validationRule.errorMessage: End Date must be greater than Start Date

fields.name: Was_this_you_most_recent_employer
fields.fieldText: Was this you most recent employer?

fields.name: Course_Detail_Text
fields.fieldText: Your Course Detail

fields.name: Educational_Establishment
fields.fieldText: Educational Establishment

validationRule.errorMessage: Educational Establishment must be 50 characters or less

fields.name: Course_Name
fields.fieldText: Course Name

validationRule.errorMessage: Course Name must be 50 characters or less

fields.name: Course_Start_Date
fields.fieldText: Course Start Date

fields.name: Course_End_Date
fields.fieldText: Course End Date

validationRule.errorMessage: End Date must be greater than Start Date

fields.name: Reference_Agreeement
fields.fieldText: I acknowledge that {!Get_Candidate.Brand__c} will verify the contents of my registration including asking referees to provide a reference and that this falls into legitimate business interest as defined by the Data Protection Act 2018.

fields.name: Signature_1
fields.fieldText:
Signature:

{!Signature}

fields.name: Date_1
fields.fieldText:
Date:

{!$Flow.CurrentDate}

fields.name: Text234
fields.fieldText: Reference Details

fields.name: Text324
fields.fieldText:
The more references you can give us, the better the choice of work opportunities we can put you forward for.

 

At this stage, as a minimum we require 2 references with one being your most recent employer/education establishment.

 

Please click next to submit your reference below:

fields.name: Zero_Reference_Text
fields.fieldText: Great! Thanks for submitting your first reference, just one more to submit. Click next to submit your second reference…

fields.name: More_Than2_Text
fields.fieldText:
Looks like you have added the minimum amount of references. Feel free to carry on adding more so we can get to know you better.


Once you are done feel free to close this window to return to your “to do” list

fields.name: Text234_0
fields.fieldText: Reference Details

fields.name: One_Reference_Text2_0
fields.fieldText: All done – thanks for letting us get to know you better. Click next to go back to your “to do” list

textTemplates.name: Signature
textTemplates.text: {!Get_Candidate.Name}
